app.title: Bastet Shelter
common.tryAgainError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
home.heroSubtitle: Browse animals from shelters across Spain that are ready for adoption. Every animal deserves a loving home.
location.title: Where are you located?
location.subtitle: Select your province to see animals from nearby shelters.
animals.availableSubtitle: Meet the animals looking for a forever home in this province.
animals.fetchError: Something went wrong while fetching the animals.
animals.noneAvailableProvince: No animals available for adoption in this province.
animals.tryDifferentProvince: Try selecting a different province from the header above.
animals.notCurrentlyAvailable: This animal is not currently available for adoption.
animals.detailNotFound: Animal not found or something went wrong.
adoption.loadMineError: Failed to load your adoptions. Please try again later.
adoption.emptyMine: You don't have any active adoption processes yet.
adoption.mineSubtitle: Click on an adoption card to view details and track your process
adoption.loadProcessError: Failed to load the adoption process. Please try again.
adoption.closedMessage: This adoption process was closed. Please contact the shelter for more information.
adoption.moreInfoEmail: * More information will be provided by the shelter through email.
adoption.formStepMessage: Your adoption form has been submitted and is being reviewed by the shelter. You will be notified once a decision has been made.
adoption.interviewFallback: The shelter will reach out to schedule your interview via the email address on your account.
adoption.shelterVisitFallback: The shelter will reach out to arrange your visit via the email address on your account.
adoption.pickupFallback: The shelter will confirm a pickup date shortly.
adoption.signError: Something went wrong while signing. Please try again.
adoption.contractUnavailable: The contract document is not yet available. The shelter will upload it shortly.
adoption.canSignWhenUploaded: You can sign once the contract document has been uploaded.
adoption.form.intro: Tell us a bit about yourself and your home. All fields are required.
adoption.form.hasGarden: I have a garden or outdoor space
adoption.form.otherPetsDescription: Tell us about your other pets
adoption.form.previousExperience: I have previous experience with pets
adoption.form.hoursAlone: Hours the animal would be alone per day
adoption.form.reason: Why do you want to adopt?
adoption.form.reasonHint: Tell us what motivated you to adopt...
auth.magicLinkSent: We've sent a secure magic link to {email}.
auth.magicLinkInstructions: Click the link in the email to securely log in and continue your adoption journey.
auth.enterDetails: Enter your details to receive a secure login link.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please request a new link.
auth.requestError: Something went wrong. Please check your email and try again.
auth.noToken: No token found in the URL.
auth.invalidMagicLink: Invalid or expired magic link. Please try logging in again.
